test-case.description: returns a hashtable with all expected sections
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-EngineConfig defaults.returns a hashtable with all expected sections

test-case.description: creates working directories under Root
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-EngineConfig defaults.creates working directories under Root

test-case.description: returns conservative production defaults
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-EngineConfig defaults.returns conservative production defaults

test-case.description: returns a NEW object each call (not a cached reference)
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-EngineConfig defaults.returns a NEW object each call (not a cached reference)

test-case.description: merges values from engine.config.json
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-EngineConfig file merge.merges values from engine.config.json

test-case.description: tolerates a missing or malformed config file gracefully
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-EngineConfig file merge.tolerates a missing or malformed config file gracefully

test-case.description: returns a clone of the named section
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-ConfigSection.returns a clone of the named section

test-case.description: returns empty hashtable for missing section
test-case.name: Config.ps1.Get-ConfigSection.returns empty hashtable for missing section

test-case.description: returns a string
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.New-RunId.returns a string

test-case.description: includes a timestamp prefix (yyyyMMdd_HHmmss)
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.New-RunId.includes a timestamp prefix (yyyyMMdd_HHmmss)

test-case.description: generates unique IDs under rapid successive calls
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.New-RunId.generates unique IDs under rapid successive calls

test-case.description: replaces CRLF with pipe separator
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-SanitizeLogText (via Write-BuildLog).replaces CRLF with pipe separator

test-case.description: replaces LF with pipe separator
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-SanitizeLogText (via Write-BuildLog).replaces LF with pipe separator

test-case.description: strips control characters
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-SanitizeLogText (via Write-BuildLog).strips control characters

test-case.description: handles empty string without error
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-SanitizeLogText (via Write-BuildLog).handles empty string without error

test-case.description: does nothing when file is below threshold
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-LogRotationIfNeeded.does nothing when file is below threshold

test-case.description: renames the file when size exceeds threshold
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-LogRotationIfNeeded.renames the file when size exceeds threshold

test-case.description: does nothing if file does not exist
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-LogRotationIfNeeded.does nothing if file does not exist

test-case.description: deletes archive files older than RetentionDays
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-LogPurge.deletes archive files older than RetentionDays

test-case.description: does NOT delete the active registry.jsonl
test-case.name: Logger.ps1.Invoke-LogPurge.does NOT delete the active registry.jsonl

test-case.description: returns a hashtable with all required keys
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.returns a hashtable with all required keys

test-case.description: derives all paths from Root
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.derives all paths from Root

test-case.description: produces isolated config copies (mutation does not affect original)
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.produces isolated config copies (mutation does not affect original)

test-case.description: propagates custom Params
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.propagates custom Params

test-case.description: captures a non-empty User
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.captures a non-empty User

test-case.description: captures Hostname
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.captures Hostname

test-case.description: sets SessionId to current PID
test-case.name: Context.ps1.New-TaskContext.sets SessionId to current PID

test-case.description: grants Operator basic actions
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Test-Permission.grants Operator basic actions

test-case.description: denies Operator elevated actions
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Test-Permission.denies Operator elevated actions

test-case.description: grants Developer task creation but not config
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Test-Permission.grants Developer task creation but not config

test-case.description: grants Admin all actions
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Test-Permission.grants Admin all actions

test-case.description: returns false for unknown actions (fail-safe)
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Test-Permission.returns false for unknown actions (fail-safe)

test-case.description: does not throw when permission is granted
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Assert-Permission.does not throw when permission is granted

test-case.description: throws a descriptive error when permission is denied
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Assert-Permission.throws a descriptive error when permission is denied

test-case.description: applies RequestedRole as ceiling even if user qualifies higher
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Resolve-UserRole ceiling enforcement.applies RequestedRole as ceiling even if user qualifies higher

test-case.description: returns a valid role string in all cases
test-case.name: Auth.ps1.Resolve-UserRole ceiling enforcement.returns a valid role string in all cases

test-case.description: returns the value from the ScriptBlock on first attempt
test-case.name: Retry.ps1.Invoke-WithRetry - success path.returns the value from the ScriptBlock on first attempt

test-case.description: returns after a transient failure followed by success
test-case.name: Retry.ps1.Invoke-WithRetry - success path.returns after a transient failure followed by success

test-case.description: throws after exhausting all retries
test-case.name: Retry.ps1.Invoke-WithRetry - failure path.throws after exhausting all retries

test-case.description: respects MaxRetries count (n+1 total attempts)
test-case.name: Retry.ps1.Invoke-WithRetry - failure path.respects MaxRetries count (n+1 total attempts)

test-case.description: registered PID is protected from zombie cleanup
test-case.name: ComHelper.ps1.Register-EngineCom / Unregister-EngineCom / Remove-ZombieCom.registered PID is protected from zombie cleanup

test-case.description: handles null input without throwing
test-case.name: ComHelper.ps1.Invoke-ReleaseComObject.handles null input without throwing

test-case.description: respects the max iteration cap (does not spin forever)
test-case.name: ComHelper.ps1.Invoke-ReleaseComObject.respects the max iteration cap (does not spin forever)

test-case.description: alias exists and points to Invoke-ReleaseComObject
test-case.name: ComHelper.ps1.Release-ComObject alias.alias exists and points to Invoke-ReleaseComObject

test-case.description: builds correct dimensions for data + header
test-case.name: ExcelHelper.ps1.Write-ExcelRange 2D array construction.builds correct dimensions for data + header

test-case.description: skips header row when WriteHeaders = false
test-case.name: ExcelHelper.ps1.Write-ExcelRange 2D array construction.skips header row when WriteHeaders = false

test-case.description: contains all expected format codes
test-case.name: ExcelHelper.ps1.ExcelFormats dictionary.contains all expected format codes

test-case.description: function Write-ExcelData exists as alias to Write-ExcelRange
test-case.name: ExcelHelper.ps1.Write-ExcelData backward-compatibility alias.function Write-ExcelData exists as alias to Write-ExcelRange

test-case.description: returns true immediately when session is not busy
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Wait-SapReady.returns true immediately when session is not busy

test-case.description: returns false when session stays busy past timeout
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Wait-SapReady.returns false when session stays busy past timeout

test-case.description: returns true if Info throws (assume ready on error)
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Wait-SapReady.returns true if Info throws (assume ready on error)

test-case.description: uses GetCellValue for GuiGridView type
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Export-SapTableToArray - ALV detection.uses GetCellValue for GuiGridView type

test-case.description: uses GetCell for GuiTableControl type
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Export-SapTableToArray - ALV detection.uses GetCell for GuiTableControl type

test-case.description: respects CancellationToken and returns partial results
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Export-SapTableToArray - ALV detection.respects CancellationToken and returns partial results

test-case.description: uses a List internally (not += array operator)
test-case.name: SapHelper.ps1.Export-SapTableToArray - ALV detection.uses a List internally (not += array operator)

test-case.description: does not throw for a non-empty value
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-Param.does not throw for a non-empty value

test-case.description: throws for an empty string
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-Param.throws for an empty string

test-case.description: throws for a whitespace-only string
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-Param.throws for a whitespace-only string

test-case.description: includes the parameter name in the error message
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-Param.includes the parameter name in the error message

test-case.description: does not throw when file exists
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-FileExists.does not throw when file exists

test-case.description: throws when file does not exist
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-FileExists.throws when file does not exist

test-case.description: does not throw for a non-null session
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-SapSession.does not throw for a non-null session

test-case.description: throws for a null session
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Assert-SapSession.throws for a null session

test-case.description: validates multiple params at once

test-case.description: validates files and params together
test-case.name: Assertions.ps1.Test-TaskAsset.validates files and params together

test-case.description: writes a valid JSONL entry to the log file
test-case.name: Integration: Full Log Write Cycle.writes a valid JSONL entry to the log file

test-case.description: sanitizes newlines in Detail field
test-case.name: Integration: Full Log Write Cycle.sanitizes newlines in Detail field

test-case.description: Write-RunResult writes an OK entry with elapsed time

test-case.description: auto-creates the logs directory when it does not exist (CRITICAL-ISSUE-1)

test-case.description: JSONL entries written after auto-dir-create are valid JSON (CRITICAL-ISSUE-1)
test-case.name: Integration: Full Log Write Cycle.JSONL entries written after auto-dir-create are valid JSON (CRITICAL-ISSUE-1)

test-case.description: WARN log message contains a numeric delay value (not empty "s.")

test-case.description: merges a config file that omits optional sections without throwing
test-case.name: Config.ps1 - missing optional sections (CRITICAL-ISSUE-3).merges a config file that omits optional sections without throwing

test-case.name: Config.ps1 - missing optional sections (CRITICAL-ISSUE-3).keeps default values for sections absent from the config file

test-case.description: merges a config file that supplies only one optional section
